problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
